headline: Bubbles McFizzypop Loses Bet, Forced To Speak Only In Rhymes For Entire Year
summary: The year is now known as 'The Great Rhyme Crime' by locals who are 'tired of it.'
fullBody: Bubbles McFizzypop lost a bet and is now legally required to speak only in rhymes for an entire year. 'It seemed fine at the time, but now it's a climb,' McFizzypop said. Friends report that conversations are 'exhausting' and 'make them want to drink wine.' McFizzypop's year ends in December, which he calls 'a time I will remember.' Locals are counting down the days.
